$comment: Specific dated events that can't be reliably auto-scraped from their host. Add an entry with the wall-clock start time in the region's timezone (America/New_York for MetroWest). Re-run `npm run ingest` to pick up changes.

events.title: Mahjong Mondays! Class 1
events.description: Class with Christina Awad of Tile & Grace Mahjong at Ten Trees Books in Natick. Part of an ongoing class series. Watch tentreesbooks.com/events/calendar for additional dates.
